parameters: \p2Hey there! We're a group of adventurers,
and we heard that you're in need of some
help. We're here to offer our services.
\mayorOh, yes, good! Thank you very much!
\mayorYou see, the problem is, there is a monster at
the lake. It's a Water Elemental that has been
disturbing the soldiers while they are on errands!
\mayorIt's very frustrating. Can you take it out for me?
\mayorThank you! Now, please follow me outside.
\p3Uh... I think we actually took her out already,
without even knowing she was bothering you!
\mayorOh my. Perfect! You four really are incredible!
\mayorIs there anything I can do for you in return?
\p3Yeah, actually. We're just looking for knowledge.
\mayorWelcome back! Thank you so much for
your help with the Water Elemental!
office. If you don't have an appointment,
please sit in one of those seats over
there. We will try to be with you shortly.
\solDon't listen to this guy, he's lazy. The mayor
doesn't care if you have an appointment.
\p2Hey, mayor, remember how we helped you with
the Water Elemental? We were wondering...
if it came down to it, would you vouch for
\mayorWhy, of course! He has demonstrated exactly
the type of valor and bravery our knights
should have! I am all for it!
\p2Thank you! We'll send you the invite for the ceremony!
\p2That's all three leaders! Let's head back to
Baron Smirnoff and get this ceremony started!
oh, it is you four once again!
\vilThe soldiers at the desk told me to wait
here for a meeting, but I haven't heard
anything. Come to think of it, they
didn't even ask for my name...
